task_context.actionable_question: Where do I stand compared to my class?
task_context.ai_prompt_hint: Show student's standing (top X%). Explain which metrics are above/below average.

explanation.raw_text:
Summary: You are performing exceptionally well compared to your cohort. Your average score, score percentile, and engagement percentile are all significantly higher than the cohort benchmark, indicating strong academic performance and engagement.

Insights: Outstanding Average Score: Your average score of 94.34 is well above the cohort benchmark of 66.68, showcasing your strong academic abilities. | High Score Percentile: With a score percentile of 89.8, you are in the top 10% of your class, compared to the cohort's average of 50. | Strong Engagement: Your engagement percentile of 75 indicates that you are more engaged than the average student in your cohort, who has a percentile of 50.

Educational implications: Your high performance suggests effective study habits and a strong understanding of the material.

Recommendations: medium - Continue to engage with your studies and seek challenges. - Maintaining your current level of engagement and seeking out more challenging material can help you continue to excel.

evaluation_requirements.safety_fairness_note: Conservative pilot default; human review is required before any not_applicable exception.
